spacing_and_layout.structure: Grid layout with a fixed 240px left sticky sidebar for navigation and subtotal tracking. Main content is a scrollable right pane.
spacing_and_layout.sidebar: w-[240px] fixed left-0 top-0 h-screen border-r border-border bg-background p-6 flex flex-col justify-between
spacing_and_layout.bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-[240px] right-0 h-20 backdrop-blur-md bg-background/70 border-t border-border z-40 flex items-center justify-between px-8 shadow-[0_-8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]

components.accordion: Custom-styled Framer Motion expandable cards. No default generic styles. Minimalist 1px borders, subtle padding (p-6), and sleek transition for open/close.
components.buttons: Flat background with 1px subtle border. Hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle shadow (shadow-lg), background color shifts slightly. Primary CTAs use brushed copper (#C8956C) and must maintain 4.5:1 contrast.
components.inputs: Bespoke look. Flat backgrounds, bottom-border only or very subtle 1px full border. MUST use font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums for all number inputs. Focus state: ring-1 ring-[#C8956C] border-[#C8956C].
components.glassmorphism: Used on sticky summary bar and modals. Light Mode: bg-[#FAFAFA]/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-[#E8E8E6]/40. Dark Mode: bg-[#111111]/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-[#2A2A2A]/40.
components.modal: Full screen overlay for Client Selection with luxury dark textured background. High-end entry feel.
components.drawer: Quotation History Drawer slides in from the right edge with a smooth spring animation.
components.tooltips: Formula tooltips must be subtle, dark bg (#1A1A1A) with light text (#FAFAFA) to explain cost calculations clearly.

motion_and_interactions.custom_cursor: Implement a custom cursor: small solid dot (6px) + outer translucent ring (32px) with lerp delay (use Framer Motion for the delay/spring physics). The cursor color should adapt to dark/light mode context (e.g., black in light mode, white/copper in dark mode).
motion_and_interactions.accordions: Framer motion AnimatePresence for smooth height expansion.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements MUST have explicit hover text colors and transitions (e.g., transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease).

client_selection_background.description: Dark abstract textured background with metallic accents. To be used as the immersive backdrop for the initial Client Selection Modal.

assets.icons: Use lucide-react (already installed). Keep them sparse and elegant. Stroke-width: 1.5.

implementation_instructions.currency_formatting: Create a utility function to format numbers as Indian Rupees: `new Intl.NumberFormat('en-IN', { style: 'currency', currency: 'INR' }).format(value)`.
implementation_instructions.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., `data-testid="calculate-total-button"`).
implementation_instructions.tech_stack: React (CRA) + FastAPI + Supabase. State management via Zustand. Charting via Recharts. PDF generation via jspdf.
implementation_instructions.dark_mode: Implement full dark mode toggle overriding Tailwind's default colors using CSS variables or explicit dark: classes mapped to the palette.
